para_trans: Promotion and posting from the post of Sub-Divisional Engineer (Architecture) to the post of Executive Engineer (Architecture).
GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: TRANSFER-1126 / P.No.101 (4) / SERVICE-1
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Reference: - Department of Public Works, Government Order No. Promotion-1125 / P.No.203 (Part-I) / Service-I), D. 23.03.2026.
the Sub Divisional Engineer under the administrative control of the Public Works Department
(Architecture) 6 officers of this lower cadre from the regular supplementary rolls of the year 2024-25
By promotion to the senior cadre of Executive Engineer (Architecture) under the relevant Government Order.
The position has been given. The officer at serial number 2 of the said order shall be
On request, his revised posting as Executive Engineer (Architecture) was
The name is being done in the position shown in front column 5.
2. Government Order in Reference to Mr. Boche, d. Paragraph No in 23.03.2026. 2 to 9
The terms and conditions set out in this Agreement shall apply.
